notes: Verified via WebSearch 2026-07-19 (albayan.ae, emaratalyoum.com, mohre.gov.ae): daily outdoor work ban 12:30-15:00 from June 15 to September 15 each year, run by the Ministry of Human Resources and Emiratisation (MOHRE) under the 'worker heat stress protection policy'.
Policy has run continuously for 20+ years — deliberately phrased as 'more than twenty years' rather than citing a specific edition number (e.g. '22nd year') to keep content evergreen.
Scope: construction, infrastructure, and any field work in open/uncovered locations. Indoor/shaded/air-conditioned work is exempt.
Monitoring: smart digital inspection tools plus field patrols, per MOHRE's own statements — no specific fine amount cited since none was found from an official primary source.
Single-country event (_countryCode: ae), aliasSlugs: [] to avoid base_country_leakage.
core.type is 'fixed' anchored to June 15 (start date, dominant search intent); the September 15 end date is covered in FAQ, aboutEvent, and schemaData.endDate.
